headline: Teradyne Rides on Strong UltraFLEXplus Demand: More Upside Ahead?
summary: TER's UltraFLEXplus shipments more than doubled in the past nine months as AI-driven demand boosts growth in chip testing.

headline: Love Stories Unwind
summary: The average S&P 500 stock gained 35% in the year leading up to the index's most recent all-time closing high made last Thursday (5/14).
